Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
public class Entrant extends Object
Model class representing a single entrant record stored in an event waitlist.

This class is used by Firestore object mapping and by organizer-facing UI screens such as the entrant list and waitlist map. Each entrant may include profile information, waitlist status, the location/address where they joined, and the timestamp of joining.

Relevant user stories:

  • US 02.02.01 - View entrants in the waiting list
  • US 02.02.02 - View entrant join locations on a map

  • Constructor Details

    • Entrant

      public Entrant()
      Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • Entrant

      public Entrant(String entrantId, String entrantName, String entrantEmail, String status, String joinedAddress, com.google.firebase.firestore.GeoPoint joinedLocation, Date joinedAt)
      Creates a fully populated entrant object.
      Parameters:
      entrantId - unique identifier of the entrant
      entrantName - display name of the entrant
      entrantEmail - email address of the entrant
      status - current waitlist status
      joinedAddress - human-readable join address
      joinedLocation - geographic coordinates of the join location
      joinedAt - timestamp when the entrant joined the waitlist

      Returns the timestamp when the entrant joined the waitlist.

      join timestamp, or null if unavailable

      public void setJoinedAt(Date joinedAt)
      Sets the join timestamp.
      Parameters:
      joinedAt - join time

    • hasLocation

      public boolean hasLocation()
      Indicates whether this entrant has a valid stored location for map display.
      Returns:
      true if joinedLocation is not null; otherwise false

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a concise debug string for logs.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      debug representation of the entrant

    • isOptOutNotifications

      public boolean isOptOutNotifications()
      Checks if the entrant opted out of notifications.
      Returns:
      true if opted out, false otherwise.

    • setOptOutNotifications

      public void setOptOutNotifications(boolean optOutNotifications)
      Sets the entrant's notification preference.
      Parameters:
      optOutNotifications - true to opt out, false to receive.
